RULING:
Plaintiffs MARY ANN MEADOWS BALL, CHRISTA BOLTON, EDWARD WADE BALL III's motion to vacate orders staying case PURSUANT To CCP Section 473(B). Matter was argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion is granted. Assuming without deciding that the joinders to the stay motion were valid and capable of being granted notwithstanding that the motion had been taken off calendar, plaintiffs have established good cause under CCP 473(b) to vacate the stay orders due to their genuine belief that the joinders would be taken off calendar.
